legal_notice.title: Foresight Seal
content: This form seals a prediction — about a company, industry, technology, or regulatory development —
at the exact moment you make it.
**What the seal gives you:** Cryptographic proof, dated today, that you held this foresight
before it became obvious. When the prediction resolves, the ledger entry proves you saw it first.
No one can claim you revised it after the fact. The timestamp is the record.
**What this is:** Timestamped professional opinion and foresight based on your analysis.
**What this is not:** A factual assertion that the predicted event has occurred.
Do not submit predictions framed as established facts. Seal what you foresee — not what you accuse.

fields.label: Your Full Name or Professional Name
fields.description: The name attached to this foresight record.

fields.label: Subject of Prediction
fields.description: Who or what is this prediction about?
fields.placeholder: Company name / Industry sector / Technology / Regulatory domain

fields.label: Date of This Prediction
fields.description: Today's date — the date this prediction is being sealed. Format: YYYY-MM-DD

fields.label: Expected Resolution Timeframe
fields.description: When do you expect this prediction to resolve — prove true or false?
fields.placeholder: Within 12 months / By Q4 2027 / Within 3 years

fields.label: The Prediction — Exact
fields.description: State your prediction precisely. Specific enough to be verifiable when it resolves.
fields.placeholder: State the prediction exactly. Be specific about what you foresee, for whom, and under what conditions.

fields.label: Reasoning and Evidence Basis
fields.description: What analysis, signals, or patterns lead you to this foresight?
fields.placeholder: Describe the reasoning, signals, or evidence base that supports this prediction.

fields.label: Implication If Correct
fields.description: If this prediction resolves true — what does it mean for the subject? For the industry?
fields.placeholder: Describe what it means if this prediction is correct.

fields.label: Falsification Condition
fields.description: What specific outcome would prove this prediction wrong?
fields.placeholder: Describe what would falsify this prediction.

fields.label: Confidence Level
fields.description: How confident are you in this prediction?
fields.placeholder: High / Moderate / Speculative — and briefly why

fields.label: Supporting Analysis Files (Optional)
fields.description: Upload any supporting analysis, data, or research that informs this prediction.

fields.label: Supporting Links (Optional)
fields.description: Links to public information supporting the reasoning basis.
fields.placeholder: Links to public sources, reports, or data supporting your analysis.

fields.label: Declaration
options: I affirm this is my genuine professional opinion and foresight — not a factual claim that this event has occurred.
I affirm the reasoning basis described is my honest analysis — not fabricated to support a predetermined conclusion.
I understand this submission is immutable — it cannot be altered after sealing.
I understand the protocol seals my prediction and reasoning as of today — it does not guarantee the prediction is correct.

steps: Completeness check — Reviewed for completeness and declaration compliance.
Sealing — Sealed with a FROZEN-2.0 triple-time cryptographic stamp. Permanent.
Ledger entry — Enters the Sovereign Trace ledger with your name, timestamp, and SHA-256 hash.
Notification — You receive your ledger entry ID and SHA-256 hash.
When your prediction resolves — contact the protocol office with your ledger entry ID. The resolution will be noted in the public record. The timestamp is permanent either way.
after_submit.footer:
The seal is the proof. The ledger is the track record.

Sovereign Trace Protocol | Sheldon K. Salmon | aionsystem2026@gmail.com
